history.en: Traditional Colombian scent hound descended from European and North American scenthounds brought to Colombia, adapted over centuries to local terrain and climate. Developed by rural hunters for tenacity and scenting skills from local and Spanish scent hounds. Officially recognized in Colombia in early 2000s and received provisional FCI recognition in 2014.
